text: A rating for Metroid Ravenous has reportedly been spotted before quickly being removed A new Metroid game announcement could be imminent

text: Xbox is reportedly planning a way for players to convert their discs into digital copies The Disc2Digital feature will let players create a digital licence for physical games

text: 2K co-founder Christoph Hartmann joins Ubisoft to lead Creative House 2, which focuses on Tom Clancy titles Hartmann was president of 2K Games until 2017, overseeing such series as Borderlands and BioShock

text: July’s three PlayStation Plus ‘free’ Essential monthly games include Call of Duty Modern Warfare 3 There are three games available for subscribers to claim this month

text: GTA 6 staff accuse Rockstar of growing gender pay gap, no bonus transparency and normalizing crunch "A fifth of your salary could be withheld without any justification," one source claimed

text: How Doom: The Dark Ages – Revelations’ new weapon bridges the gap to Doom Eternal The Dark Ages gets a 10-hour expansion focused on fast flowing combat and an exciting new weapon

text: PlayStation 6 ‘almost guaranteed’ for 2028 after digital-only news, analyst says Ampere predicts Sony could offer disc-to-digital backwards compatibility plan

text: Quantic Dream denies Star Wars Eclipse is in trouble: ‘We’re continuing as planned’ Star Wars developer responds to claims from striking employees

text: The original isometric Fallout 3 wouldn’t have been cancelled if execs had bothered to see it, New Vegas lead says Josh Sawyer claims Interplay execs saw the tech demo and said they would have kept it going

text: Sony is closing the PlayStation Store on PS3 and Vita Sony had previously attempted to close the stores in 2021, but U-turned
